facebook.caption: POV: you're wandering Đường Trần Hưng Đạo and stumble into the best craft beer bar on the island. Hoppy Daze Craft Beer Bar Phu Quoc. 4.8 stars across 187 reviews. That's not luck, that's consistency. Cold pours, good people, zero resort markup. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
